data.title: RED: Modify task-execution template test to assert confidence signal instructions
data.description:
## Description
Modify the existing test for task-execution.md to assert that the sub-agent prompt template includes CONFIDENT/UNCERTAIN confidence signal instructions per the contract (plugins/dso/docs/contracts/confidence-signal.md).

## TDD Requirement
This is a modify-existing-test RED task. The modified test must FAIL because the current task-execution.md does not include confidence signal instructions.

## Test Approach
Open tests/skills/test_task_execution_template.py. Add a new test function that:
1. Reads plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/task-execution.md
2. Asserts the template contains instructions for agents to emit CONFIDENT or UNCERTAIN:<reason>
3. Asserts the template explains when to use each signal (CONFIDENT for high-confidence completion, UNCERTAIN for low-confidence)
This test executes by reading the template content and checking for the behavioral instruction pattern. It fails RED because the instruction is not yet present.

## Files to Modify
- tests/skills/test_task_execution_template.py
- .test-index (add RED marker for the new test function)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] New test function exists in test file
  Verify: grep -q 'def test_.*confidence\|def test_.*uncertain' tests/skills/test_task_execution_template.py
- [ ] Test fails (RED) when run against current template
  Verify: python3 -m pytest tests/skills/test_task_execution_template.py -k confidence 2>&1; test $? -ne 0
- [ ] .test-index RED marker added for the new test
  Verify: grep -q 'task-execution.md' .test-index
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (RED markers tolerate expected failure)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
